---
id: mute-a-group
title: "MuteGroup"
description: "通过该接口可以禁言或解禁群组全员或某些群角色。"
api: 
info_path: core_products/zim/zh/docs_zim_server_zh/group/open-api-desc
---

<h1 className={"openapi__heading"}>MuteGroup</h1>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/"}></MethodEndpoint>


通过该接口可以禁言或解禁群组全员或某些群角色。

接口调用成功后，群组内全体用户通过以下 ZIM SDK 的回调接口，得知哪些角色无法在该群组发言或可恢复发言：

| iOS-25% | Android-25% | macOS-25% | Windows-25% |
|-----|---------|-------|-------|
| [groupMutedInfoUpdated](/zim-ios/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimgroupmutedinfoupdatedoperatedinfogroupid-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMutedInfoUpdated](/zim-android/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmutedinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [groupMutedInfoUpdated](/zim-macos/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimgroupmutedinfoupdatedoperatedinfogroupid-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMutedInfoUpdated](/zim-win/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmutedinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) |

| Web-25% | 小程序-25% | Flutter-25% | React Native-25% |
|---------|-----|-------|-------|
| [onGroupMutedInfoUpdated](/zim-web/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmutedinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMutedInfoUpdated](/zim-miniprogram/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmutedinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMutedInfoUpdated](/zim-flutter/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmutedinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMutedInfoUpdated](/zim-rn/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmutedinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) |

| uni-app \| uni-app x-25% | HarmonyOS-25% |
|---------|-----------|
| [groupMutedInfoUpdated](/zim-uniapp-x/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#groupmutedinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [groupMutedInfoUpdated](/zim-harmonyos/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#groupmutedinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) |

<Note title="说明">
IsAllMuted、MuteRoleList、Duration 都不传，则解除群组内所有用户的禁言状态。

如果 Duration 非 0，IsAllMuted 传了 false，则传入的 MuteRoleList 会覆盖之前设置的禁言角色列表。

参数 FromUserId 仅支持数字，英文字符和 `'!'，'#'，'$'，'%'，'&'，'('，')'，'+'，''，':'，';'，'<'，'='，'.'，'>'，'?'，
'@'，'['，']'，'^'，'_'，'{'，'}'，'|'，'~'`。

若 FromUserId 为管理员，则 MuteRoleList[] 不能包含 1（群主）。
</Note>
<Note title="说明">调用频率限制：20 次/秒</Note>

## Request
<details style={{"marginBottom":"1rem"}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-params"}>Query Parameters</h3></summary><div><ul><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Action","in":"query","description":"> 接口原型参数\n>\n> https://zim-api.zego.im/?Action=MuteGroup\n","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["MuteGroup"]},"style":"form","explode":true}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"AppId","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。应用 Id，由 ZEGO 分配的用户唯一凭证。可从 <a target=\"_blank\" href=\"https://console.zego.im/\">ZEGO 控制台</a> 获取。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"uint32"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureNonce","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。16 位 16 进制随机字符串（8 字节随机数的 hex 编码）。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Timestamp","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。当前 Unix 时间戳，单位为秒。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>，最多允许 10 分钟的误差。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureVersion","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名版本号。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","default":"2.0","enum":["2.0"]}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Signature","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名，用于验证请求的合法性。请参考[签名机制](/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-mechanism)生成。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"FromUserId","in":"query","required":true,"description":"操作用户 ID（已在客户端调用 login 方法登录 ZIM 服务，或已调用 [服务端 API](/zim-server/user/batch-register-users) 完成注册）。\n> **说明**\n>\n> 由于禁言操作会触发群 tips 消息，因此当 FromUserId 不是群组成员时，开发者需要隐藏该消息或实现其他处理，避免群内用户产生困惑。\n","schema":{"type":"string","maxLength":32,"example":"operator_user"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"GroupId","in":"query","required":true,"description":"群组 ID。","schema":{"type":"string","maxLength":32,"example":"group123"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"IsAllMuted","in":"query","required":false,"schema":{"type":"boolean","default":false},"description":"是否全员禁言。不传则默认 false。"}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"MuteRoleList","in":"query","required":false,"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"number"}},"style":"form","explode":true,"description":"禁言角色列表，单次请求最多禁言 20 个群角色。枚举如下：\n- 1: 群主。\n- 2: 管理员。\n- 3: 群成员。\n- 其他: 开发者自定义的群角色，建议大于 100。\n\n仅当 IsAllMuted 为 false 或不传时有意义\n"}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Duration","in":"query","required":false,"schema":{"type":"number"},"description":"禁言时长，不传默认为 0。\n- -1：永久。\n- 0：取消群组级别的所有禁言。\n- 大于 0：禁言时长，单位为秒。最大支持 30 天（2592000 秒）。\n禁言有效期内，若再次设置禁言时长，以最近一次请求设置的时长延长禁言状态。\n"}}></ParamsItem></ul></div></details>
<div><div><ApiTabs label={undefined} id={undefined}><TabItem label={"200"} value={"200"}><div>OK</div><div><MimeTabs className={"openapi-tabs__mime"} schemaType={"response"}><TabItem label={"application/json"} value={"application/json"}><SchemaTabs className={"openapi-tabs__schema"}><TabItem label={"Schema"} value={"Schema"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details response"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-response"}><strong>Schema</strong></summary><ul className={"response-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Code"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"number","description":"返回码。\n\n以下仅列出了接口业务逻辑相关的返回码，完整返回码请参考 [全局返回码](/zim-server/return-codes)。\n<table>\n<thead><tr><th>返回码</th><th>说明</th><th>处理建议</th></tr></thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr><td>660000001</td><td>业务类通用错误。</td><td>请重试，或联系 ZEGO 技术支持。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660000002</td><td>参数错误。</td><td>请检查请求参数。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660300005</td><td>调用接口的频率超出了 AppID 级别限制。</td><td>请稍后再试。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600001</td><td>群组不存在。</td><td>请确认 GroupID 是否正确。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600009</td><td>获取群相关信息失败。</td><td>请先确认 GroupID 是否正确。如果正确，请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600024</td><td>FromUserId 不在群内。</td><td>请检查 FromUserId 或添加 FromUserId 为群成员</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600032</td><td>FromUserId 没权限。</td><td>FromUserId 需为群主或管理员。</td></tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Message"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"操作结果描述。","example":"success"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"RequestId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"请求 ID。","example":"343649807833778782"}}></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem><TabItem label={"Example (from schema)"} value={"Example (from schema)"}><ResponseSamples responseExample={"{\n  \"Code\": 0,\n  \"Message\": \"success\",\n  \"RequestId\": \"343649807833778782\"\n}"} language={"json"}></ResponseSamples></TabItem></SchemaTabs></TabItem></MimeTabs></div></TabItem></ApiTabs></div></div>
